gist.headline: Clearer signals from the hive
gist.blurb: We've made Portkey provider errors much easier to read by bubbling them up to the top level. No more digging through nested payloads to figure out what went wrong!
gist.summary: Promoted nested Portkey and provider error messages to the top-level error response in the text generation API.
gist.impact: Developers will now see the actual provider error message immediately without having to parse deeply nested error details.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee using a magnifying glass to inspect a glowing terminal, revealing a clear message instead of a messy one. Represents surfacing hidden/nested error details.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot using a tiny magnifying glass to read a glowing lime green (#ecf874) retro terminal screen. A chunky pixel robot companion points happily at a clear, readable message on the monitor. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
